mapping_preview.risk: Public evidence mistaken for complete hidden truth
mapping_preview.control: Show provenance, unknown, coverage and disclosure lag
mapping_preview.trigger: UI/claim uses true hidden current without evidence

mapping_preview.risk: 13F or filing data presented as real-time money flow
mapping_preview.control: Separate report period, filed, observed and amount kind
mapping_preview.trigger: UI drops period or calls snapshot flow

mapping_preview.risk: Commercial empire view interpreted as legal control
mapping_preview.control: Separate structure, dependency and influence layers

mapping_preview.risk: Recursive exploration produces graph explosion and unusable hairball
mapping_preview.control: Hard budgets, lazy expand, grouping and truncation explanation
mapping_preview.trigger: nodes/edges exceed limits or browser freezes

mapping_preview.control: Evidence thresholds, derived labels, coverage and review
